Onsite Contact: 	Mr. Karthik T P
Arr/Dep Date: 	Nov 13, 2026 to Nov 13, 2026
Cat/Sales Mgr: 	Bavith Karkera
Rms/Cat Status: 	DEF/DEF
Block Code: 	H6Q
Thursday, November 13, 2026
Time 	Function 	Room 	Set-up 	Exp/Gtd 	Rental
09:00 - 23:00 	Ceremony 	Grand Ballroom 	Conference / Theater 	500 / 0 	Included
19:00 - 23:00 	Dinner Buffet 	Sante 1 	To Be Advised 	500 / 0 	At USD 18,000.00
09:00 - 23:00 	Beverage Service 	Grand Ballroom 	Outside AV / Vendor setup 	500 / 0 	On Actuals
Food 	Banquet Operations
Food Beverage Service (Summary)
Tea / Coffee / Cookies station active all day
Hi-Tea service in Grand Ballroom
Dinner buffet in Sante 1
Expected 500 guests, operational planning 550
Menu details continue on Page 2
Top Beverage Picks
Kingfisher Premium / Ultra
Budweiser / Heineken / Carlsberg
Additional soft beverages on actuals
GRAND BALLROOM 	09:00 TO 23:00
BANQUET SET UP
All AV from outside vendor
Setup from guest vendor
Tea/Coffee/Cookies stations active all day
BEVERAGE 	09:00 TO 23:00
Kingfisher Premium (150) - USD 5.50
Kingfisher Ultra (150) - USD 5.50
Budweiser (120) - USD 6.50
Heineken (24) - USD 6.50
Carlsberg (120) - USD 6.50
FLOW OF EVENT 	EVENING
Host arrival: 4:00 PM
Registration: 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Main event: 6:00 PM - 10:00 PM
Starters + Bar: 7:00 PM
Dinner: 7:30 PM

M A R R I O T T 	INTERNAL
BANQUET EVENT
ORDER
Marriott Austin Downtown
304 E Cesar Chavez St
Austin, TX 78701, USA
Phone: +1 (512) 555-0180
Fax: +1 (512) 555-0147
Page 2 of 3
Marriott Confidential and Proprietary Information
Thursday, November 13, 2026
BANQUET REMARKS 	BILLING INSTRUCTIONS
Grand Ballroom (09:00 to 23:00)
Stage location at Ballroom 4, size 36x24
Podium required
Two registration tables at WBC front
Two registration tables at PFA
Theater style seating for 550 guests
Linen: Black
Four tea/coffee counters in PFA center
Dinner buffet placement to Sante
Round table clusters in Sante
Three bars to be arranged at PFA
Directional signage in all venues
Flow of Event
Setup in: 11:00 PM on Nov 12, 2026
Host arrival: 4:00 PM
Registration: 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Event starts: 6:00 PM
Starters + bar: 7:00 PM
Dinner at 7:30 PM
Billing Instructions
Minimum Guarantee (MG): 500
Expected Guests (EXP): 550
Dinner to be charged USD 39.00 plus taxes per person
10% surcharge applies above expected guest count
Mode of payment: Direct
One point of contact / signing authority: Mr. Karthik
Event Contacts
Event Incharge: James
Sales Incharge: Bavith
DINNER MENU
Welcome Drink
Soup: Hot and Sour
Bakers Basket: Herbed focaccia, soft roll, hard roll, lavash
Veg Appetizers: Elaichi paneer tikka, Jalapeno cheese shots
Non-Veg Appetizers: Hariyali chicken tikka, Mountain chili fish
Salads: Beetroot walnut mandarin, Mexican corn, Indian green salad
Mains: Paneer Lahori, Kadhai Subz, Dal Maharani, Subz dum biryani
Non-Veg Mains: Chicken makhani, Goan fish curry
Breads: Roti / Naan / Paratha variants
Date Last Printed: 04-25-26 	Page 2 of 3
4/25/26, 11:55 AM 	Internal Banquet Event Order - Distinct Communications (US)

FRONT OFFICE REMARKS 	HOUSEKEEPING REMARKS
Guests to be guided to venue accordingly. 	Areas to be manned and cleaned throughout event duration.
SYSTEMS REMARKS 	LOSS PREVENTION REMARKS
Provide four Wi-Fi access codes for event team. 	Cover all guest movement areas and parking access.
ENGINEERING REMARKS 	KITCHEN REMARKS
Ensure uninterrupted lights and HVAC operation. 	All meal MG is 500, Expected 550.
DESSERTS / SIDES
Angoori Rasmalai
Walnut Chocolate Pudding
Gulab Jamun
Vanilla Ice Cream
Vegetable Raita
Papad selection (Aplam, Sago, Dal)
Pickles (Mixed, Mango)
Deposit Summary 	Team Sign-off
